case_title: YEE, TOMMY vs. SUGIOKA, TED et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, TOMMY SERVED AUG-31-1998, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT SUGIOKA, TED DOES 1 TO 10

DECLARATION OF TOMMY YEE FILED RE: AMENDED MONEY JUDGMENT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YEE, TOMMY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUGIOKA, TED THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 5021 CALIFORNIA ST #5, LEASE FORFEITED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUGIOKA, TED THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON SEPTEMBER 30, 1998 $6,099.90 RENT, $187.40 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,287.30, LEASE FORFEITED
